full_content:
Machine-checkable contract for the GT-KB / Agent Red / applications/ namespace topology rules: fast_check + deep_check + doctor invariants

This DCL specifies the machine-checkable contract for the project-root-boundary topology rules established in GOV-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-001. It defines the registry entry that GOV-CROSS-CUTTING-REQUIREMENTS-MECHANICAL-ENFORCEMENT-001 will use to enforce the topology at write-time and at Codex-review-time.

REGISTRY ENTRY (when DCL-CROSS-CUTTING-REQUIREMENTS-REGISTRY-001 implementation lands, this entry MUST be present in `.claude/rules/cross-cutting-requirements.toml`):

  [requirements.CCR-PROJECT-ROOT-BOUNDARY-001]
  id = "CCR-PROJECT-ROOT-BOUNDARY-001"
  title = "GT-KB / Agent Red / applications/ namespace topology"
  rule_text = """
  All GT-KB files MUST be in E:\\GT-KB. All files in E:\\GT-KB are GT-KB EXCEPT files in E:\\GT-KB\\applications\\. All Agent Red files MUST be in E:\\GT-KB\\applications\\Agent_Red\\. The applications\\ subdirectory contains ONLY named sub-directories, each holding one deployed application.
  """
  source.file = ".claude/rules/project-root-boundary.md"
  source.section = "Directive"
  source.delib_id = "DELIB-S330-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-RULE"
  source.gov_id = "GOV-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-001"
  file_scope = ["**/*"]  # universal — any file write/edit/move

  fast_check.kind = "script"
  fast_check.script = "scripts/check_project_root_boundary.py"
  fast_check.message = """
  BLOCKED (CCR-PROJECT-ROOT-BOUNDARY-001): operation violates the GT-KB project root boundary. See GOV-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-001 for the 5 binding rules. Either: (a) revise to comply (move Agent-Red-related files under applications\\Agent_Red\\); or (b) cite an owner-approved exception DELIB in your bridge proposal.
  """

  deep_check.prompt = """
  Does this proposal modify, create, or move files at E:\\GT-KB\\ root that should logically belong under E:\\GT-KB\\applications\\Agent_Red\\? Specifically check:
  - Agent Red app code at root (admin/, widget/, src/agents/, src/multi_tenant/)
  - Agent Red CI workflow files (.github/workflows/release-candidate-gate.yml, .github/workflows/security-scan.yml, .github/workflows/python-tests.yml)
  - Agent Red Docker/infrastructure (Dockerfile*, infrastructure/terraform/)
  - Agent Red Python deps (requirements.txt, requirements-test.txt)
  - Agent Red identity files (vision.md, README.md saying "Agent Red")
  If yes, the proposal violates this rule unless an explicit waiver DELIB is cited.
  """
  deep_check.expected = "no_violation_found"
  deep_check.evidence_required = true

  exceptions = [
    {
      delib_id = "DELIB-S330-AGENT-RED-MIGRATION-PENDING-WAIVER"
      scope = "Any commit on develop branch that touches Agent Red files at GT-KB root, until GTKB-ISOLATION-018-AGENT-RED-FILE-MIGRATION VERIFIED"
      expiry = "GTKB-ISOLATION-018-AGENT-RED-FILE-MIGRATION VERIFIED"
      residual_risk = "Agent Red files remain at GT-KB root in violation of the rule until migration completes; cross-contamination risk between GT-KB platform changes and Agent Red app changes during the interim period"
    }
  ]

CHECK SCRIPT CONTRACT (binding):
- `scripts/check_project_root_boundary.py` MUST:
  (a) Accept the operation payload via stdin (Claude Code PreToolUse hook JSON: tool_name, tool_input).
  (b) For Write/Edit operations: extract the target file path from tool_input.file_path; check if path matches any of the "agent-red-at-gt-kb-root" patterns (a configurable allowlist of paths that are KNOWN to be Agent Red files at GT-KB root, currently pending migration).
  (c) For Bash operations: parse the command; flag commands that create files at GT-KB root matching Agent-Red patterns.
  (d) Return exit 0 with empty stdout if no violation; exit 0 with `{"decision": "block", "reason": "<message>"}` if violation detected; exit 1 only on internal error.
  (e) Allow operations that match an active exception DELIB's scope; the script consults the exceptions[] list at runtime.

DOCTOR INVARIANTS (testable; runs in `gt project doctor`):
- `gt project doctor` MUST verify (when this DCL's implementation lands):
  (a) Every file at `E:\GT-KB\` root that the registry's "agent-red-at-gt-kb-root" allowlist marks as Agent-Red is also covered by an active (unexpired) exception DELIB; if any such file lacks coverage, doctor reports ERROR.
  (b) `E:\GT-KB\applications\Agent_Red\` exists and contains a `.git` directory pointing at `https://github.com/mike-remakerdigital/agent-red` (once migration completes); if remote points elsewhere, doctor reports ERROR.
  (c) `E:\GT-KB\applications\` contains ONLY named sub-directories (no files, no `_test_*` patterns); if non-conforming entries exist, doctor reports ERROR.
  (d) `E:\GT-KB\.git` remote points at `https://github.com/Remaker-Digital/groundtruth-kb`; if it points elsewhere, doctor reports ERROR.
  (e) Exception DELIB DELIB-S330-AGENT-RED-MIGRATION-PENDING-WAIVER either exists with valid expiry OR has been retired (post-migration); reports WARN if approaching expiry, ERROR if expired-but-still-cited.

REGRESSION TEST CONTRACT (binding):
- `tests/scripts/test_check_project_root_boundary.py` MUST exist (or equivalent path post-migration) and verify:
  (a) Fast-check correctly blocks Write to a known Agent-Red-at-root path when no exception is cited.
  (b) Fast-check correctly allows Write when an active exception DELIB's scope covers the operation.
  (c) Deep-check prompt evaluates as expected against fixture proposals (one violating, one compliant, one with cited waiver).
  (d) Doctor invariants fire correctly for each of (a)-(e) above.

Rationale:
This DCL turns the GOV's prose rules into executable checks that the cross-cutting-requirements registry can run. Without machine-checkable form, the topology rules remain voluntary-compliance only — exactly the failure mode that caused the Slice 8.6 incident. The exception mechanism allows the current pending-migration state to be tracked and bounded rather than left as silent drift.

Owner approval: Approve as drafted (S330 chat, 2026-05-04, via AskUserQuestion).
explicit_change_request: Owner approved insertion via AskUserQuestion: "Approve as drafted". This artifact spawns from DELIB-S330-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-RULE. Source intent: Machine-checkable contract for GOV-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-001; fast_check + deep_check + doctor invariants + regression test contract; includes documented exception for current pre-migration state.
change_reason: S330 spawn-queue item: DCL-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-CHECK-001 created from DELIB-S330-AGENT-RED-NESTED-IN-APPLICATIONS-RULE per just-approved DELIB-S330-SPEC-CAPTURE-TRANSPARENCY transparency rule.
